prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别约为3193名、3198名、2783名、4504名、3443名。2024年出现较大幅度后移（较2023年后移约1721名），2025年明显回升（较2024年前移约1061名），整体呈现"V型"波动。2025年基准位次约3443名；该校在贵州省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2025年均为80人，2026年计划大幅增至126人，扩招46人，增幅达57.5%。大幅扩招显著增加了招生名额供给，对竞争压力有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第27位、2022年第25位、2023年第26位、2024年第30位、2025年第31位、2026年第32位，近年排名略有后移但仍稳居全国前35强，属于国内顶尖工科院校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园偷拍安全事件（事件统计35条，其中负面34条），可能对部分考生及家长的报考心理产生一定抑制效应。抖音热度排名第87位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低。历史投档异常记录中未见华南理工大学有明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，轻工技术与工程获评A+，化学工程与技术、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程、食品科学与工程获评A，建筑学、控制科学与工程、机械工程、管理科学与工程获评A-。工科实力突出，尤其在轻工、化工、材料、食品等领域具有全国领先地位，与招生专业中的工科试验班大类高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与华南理工大学优势工科方向高度契合，有利于吸引高分考生报考。贵州省2026年高考总考生约299000人，较2025年（约297258人）略有增加，竞争基数小幅上升。；华南理工大学位于广东省广州市，属于粤港澳大湾区核心城市，对西南地区考生具有较强地域吸引力。该校在贵州省招生人数占全国总招生比例约1.5%–2%，属于跨省招生中占比中等的省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升趋势、2026年大幅扩招57.5%带来的名额供给增加、声誉负面事件的轻微抑制效应、以及工科专业热度持续偏高等因素，但考虑到扩招幅度极大且2025年已出现明显回升，适度下调修正量后，预测2026年理科（物理类）最低录取位次约4551名，波动区间4051–5051名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3193, 3198, 2783, 4504, and 3443 respectively. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift (about 1721 places compared to 2023), and in 2025, there was a clear recovery (about 1061 places forward compared to 2024), showing a 'V-shaped' fluctuation. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3443; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Guizhou Province was 80 students each year from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 126 students, an expansion of 46 students, an increase of 57.5%. The substantial expansion significantly increases the supply of enrollment slots, which helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 27th in 2021, 25th in 2022, 26th in 2023, 30th in 2024, 31st in 2025, and 32nd in 2026. Although its ranking has slightly declined in recent years, it remains firmly among the top 35 universities nationwide, belonging to the top-tier engineering institutions. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus peeping safety incidents (35 incidents recorded, 34 of which are negative), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on the application psychology of some candidates and parents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th, with an average evaluation, indicating moderately low exposure on short video platforms. There is no obvious signal of a significant drop in historical admission records for South China University of Technology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Light Industry Technology and Engineering was rated A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Food Science and Engineering were rated A, and Architecture, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering were rated A-. Its engineering strength is outstanding, especially in light industry, chemical engineering, materials, and food, with a national leading position, highly matching the engineering experimental class categories in its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, which aligns well with South China University of Technology's advantageous engineering directions, helping to attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,258 in 2025, with a small rise in the competitive base. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, a core city in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, which has a strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. The proportion of students enrolled in Guizhou Province relative to the total national enrollment is about 1.5%–2%, making it a province with a moderate share in cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery trend in 2025 rankings, the significant 57.5% expansion in 2026 increasing the supply of slots, the slight inhibitory effect of negative reputation incidents, and the persistently high popularity of engineering majors, but taking into account the extremely large expansion and the clear recovery in 2025, after moderately adjusting the correction, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will be about 4551, with a fluctuation range of 4051–5051.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, South China University of Technology significantly expands its enrollment in Guizhou for science (physics category) to 126 students, with a predicted ranking of about 4551, ranging from 4051 to 5051. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as their main direction, with Tier 1 majors as a sprint choice (especially popular directions like AI Top Talent Class and Outstanding Talent Class), and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (within 4051) can focus on sprinting for top-tier Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the lower limit of the range (around 5051) should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科（历史类）最低位次分别约为790名、984名、1735名、1830名、1338名。2021–2023年逐年后移，2024年达到最高点1830名后，2025年明显前移至1338名，回升约492名。近5年波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约1338名；该校在贵州省文科（历史类）招生计划2021–2025年均为23人，2026年计划增至27人，扩招4人，增幅约17.4%。扩招幅度适中，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第32位，稳居全国前35强。虽以工科见长，但作为综合性985高校，文科专业同样具有较高社会认可度；2026年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园安全事件，可能对部分考生及家长的报考心理产生轻微抑制效应。抖音热度排名第87位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；华南理工大学文科相关学科中，管理科学与工程获评A-，与工商管理类、行政管理等招生专业相关；食品科学与工程获评A，与相关管理方向有交叉。整体而言，文科优势学科数量少于工科，但依托985平台仍具竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度为推荐（偏热），新闻传播学为明显劝退，工商管理类为分化观望。贵州省2026年高考总考生约299000人，按近年历史类占比约30%估算，历史类考生约89700人，与2025年（90087人）基本持平。；华南理工大学位于广东省广州市，粤港澳大湾区核心城市，对西南地区文科考生具有较强地域吸引力。该校在贵州省文科招生人数占比较小，但2026年扩招后增至27人，名额有所增加。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次明显回升趋势、2026年扩招17.4%带来的名额增加、声誉负面事件的轻微影响、以及文科考生总数基本稳定等因素，结合2025年已出现的回升势头适度下调修正量后，预测2026年文科（历史类）最低录取位次约1448名，波动区间1231–1665名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 790, 984, 1735, 1830, and 1338 respectively. Rankings moved backward year by year from 2021 to 2023, reached a peak of 1830 in 2024, then significantly moved forward to 1338 in 2025, a rebound of about 492 places. Fluctuations have been large over the past 5 years, with a baseline ranking of about 1338 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Guizhou Province was 23 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and will increase to 27 students in 2026, an expansion of 4 students, an increase of about 17.4%. The expansion is moderate and will somewhat alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 32nd, firmly in the top 35 nationally. Although known for engineering, as a comprehensive 985 university, its liberal arts programs also have high social recognition. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to campus safety incidents, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' and parents' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th, with an average evaluation, indicating moderate to low exposure on short video platforms. Among SCUT's liberal arts-related disciplines, Management Science and Engineering is rated A-, related to enrollment majors like Business Administration and Public Administration; Food Science and Engineering is rated A, with some overlap with related management directions. Overall, the number of advantageous liberal arts disciplines is fewer than engineering, but it remains competitive due to its 985 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Law is recommended (slightly hot), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and Business Administration is polarized and uncertain. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Guizhou Province is about 299,000. Based on the recent proportion of history category candidates at about 30%, the estimated number of history category candidates is about 89,700, roughly the same as in 2025 (90,087). South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a core city in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from the southwest. The university's enrollment of liberal arts students in Guizhou Province is relatively small, but after the 2026 expansion, it will increase to 27 students, with more spots available.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the 17.4% enrollment expansion in 2026 increasing spots, the slight impact of negative reputation incidents, and the basically stable total number of liberal arts candidates, combined with the rebound momentum already seen in 2025 with moderate downward adjustment, the predicted minimum admission ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 is about 1448, with a fluctuation range of 1231 to 1665.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, South China University of Technology will expand its enrollment in Guizhou liberal arts (history category) to 27 students, with a predicted ranking of about 1448, range 1231–1665. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Business Administration, Journalism and Communication), use Tier 1 majors as a stretch (Law, Economics, Accounting), and use Tier 3 major Public Administration as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (within 1231) can focus on reaching for Law and Economics Innovation Class; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (around 1665) should secure Public Administration as a safe choice.
